MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-31-2014 IN 206, DEFENDANT BRYAN LOPUCK'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DATES. JENNY SILVERSTEIN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. NO OPPOSITION FILED. AFTER FINDING GOOD CAUSE, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE BASED ON THE DECLARATION OF COUNSEL THAT ALL PARTIES AGREED ON THE CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/25/14 IS CONTINUED TO 1/12/15 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
